# Toxicity

**Summary**: The degree to which a substance can damage an ecosystem or living organism.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-sanmi|Sanmi, 2011]] evaluated toxicity to ensure the mud was environmentally friendly.

## Scientific Context

- [[2011-sanmi|Sanmi, 2011]] Crucial for offshore and environmentally sensitive areas.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2011-sanmi|Sanmi, 2011]] Assessed through toxicity testing protocols.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The developed canola oil-based mud system had zero level of toxicity. ([[2011-sanmi|Sanmi, 2011, p. 88]])
